about.heading: About Local Government
about.mission: Local government brings decision-making closer to communities, supporting local democracy, public services, infrastructure, environmental health, community development and responsive administration across Guyana.
about.function: Local government operates through three tiers to serve citizens. These bodies handle local roads, drainage, sanitation, markets, public spaces, permits, environmental management, civic participation and community development.

tiers.name: Municipalities
tiers.note: Georgetown, Mabaruma, Anna Regina, New Amsterdam, Rose Hall, Corriverton, Linden, Mahdia, Lethem, Bartica

about.legalFramework: The system operates under the Local Democratic Organs Act, Chapter 28:09, which establishes the authority and responsibilities of local democratic organs.
